assertions.text: Uses area.nodeViews.get(nodeId)?.position to capture node canvas positions
assertions.evidence: `area.nodeViews.get(node.id)?.position ?? { x: 0, y: 0 }` — correct API for reading position from the area plugin.

assertions.text: Serialized connections include sourceOutput and targetInput fields
assertions.evidence: Connection serialization: `{ id: c.id, source: c.source, sourceOutput: c.sourceOutput, target: c.target, targetInput: c.targetInput }` — all four endpoint fields included.

assertions.text: editor.clear() is called before re-populating the editor during import
assertions.evidence: `await editor.clear()` is first line of importGraph().

assertions.text: Import uses a factory function or switch statement to re-create node instances by type name
assertions.evidence: `createNodeByType()` factory function with switch on `saved.type` (NumberNode/AddNode cases).

assertions.text: InputControl values are restored on re-created nodes using setValue() or equivalent
assertions.evidence: `ctrl.setValue(value as any)` called for writable InputControls during import.
